title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems already understand and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that society is insufficiently addressing the resulting risks. He discusses AI-driven job displacement, limitations of corporate self-regulation, and the need for regulatory steering of AI development.
